title: Food Culture RPG

source.name: Treasure Vault - RPG about food culture

hook: Read host cues across a regional food route, then answer with ingredients, customs, or a regional dish before patience runs out.
mechanic: Compact canvas RPG route. The player taps one of three action plates to match food-culture cues, manage ingredient/custom stock, build rapport, discover dishes, and advance route levels under patience and stamina pressure.

dedupe.notes: Scoped manual build requested directly from Treasure Vault idea. No repo-wide dedupe tooling was run because ownership was limited to this game folder.
